app.name: Ciclista Denuncie
app.description: Platform to report and view traffic violations against cyclists
blog.title: Blog
blog.description: Ciclista Denuncie Blog — urban mobility, cycling activism and traffic safety.
blog.comingSoon: Coming soon: publications about urban mobility, cycling activism and traffic safety.
blog.subtitle: Digital Journal
blog.post1.title: Why does Ciclista, Denuncie! exist?
blog.post1.excerpt: Learn the story behind the platform born from the difficulty cyclists face in reporting traffic incidents and turning experiences into data.
blog.post1.intro: Has anyone here ever managed to file a police report about a situation while cycling?\nOr tried and couldn't?
blog.post1.p1: From this pain and this difficulty — so common among those who ride — the Ciclista, Denuncie! platform was developed, precisely thinking about the barrier many cyclists face in reporting situations that occur in traffic, and ensuring they don't get lost or treated as isolated cases.
blog.post1.p2: The platform was born with the purpose of gathering and mapping these occurrences, bringing tangible data on where they happen most frequently and what the most recurring situations faced by cyclists are — such as dangerous close passes, threats, harassment, aggression, and even infrastructure issues like poorly maintained bike lanes and precarious routes.
blog.post1.p3: Because we often know these problems exist, we live them firsthand, but there are still no records that give real dimension to what happens daily.
blog.post1.p4: The proposal of Ciclista, Denuncie! is precisely to build this collective database, allowing us to look at these situations more broadly, identify patterns, and, in the future, seek concrete measures to address them and demand improvements.
blog.post1.p5: The platform was designed in a very didactic way, with explanatory guidance throughout the reporting process and, after registration, also presents a map showing where these situations are most common and where there is the highest incidence of infractions and occurrences.
blog.post1.p6: Because turning experiences into data is also a way of giving visibility to what often remains invisible.

lgpd.title: Brazilian General Data Protection Law (LGPD)
lgpd.protecaoDados.title: Personal Data Protection
lgpd.protecaoDados.desc: Ciclista Denuncie complies with Law No. 13,709/2018 (Brazilian General Data Protection Law - LGPD) and respects the privacy of all platform users.
lgpd.dadosColetados.title: Data Collected
lgpd.dadosColetados.desc: We only collect data strictly necessary for the platform's operation:
lgpd.finalidade.title: Purpose of Processing
lgpd.finalidade.desc: The collected data is used exclusively for:
lgpd.finalidade.item1: Mapping incidents related to urban bicycle mobility
lgpd.finalidade.item2: Generating public statistics on road safety
lgpd.finalidade.item3: Raising awareness about issues faced by cyclists
lgpd.finalidade.item4: Supporting public policies for urban mobility
lgpd.baseLegal.title: Legal Basis
lgpd.baseLegal.desc: The processing of personal data on this platform is based on legitimate interest (Art. 7, IX of LGPD) for the regular exercise of rights and credit protection, as well as the data subject's consent for sensitive data.
lgpd.compartilhamento.title: Data Sharing
lgpd.compartilhamento.desc: All registered reports are public and can be viewed by anyone through the interactive map. We do not share identifiable personal data with third parties.
lgpd.direitos.title: Data Subject Rights
lgpd.direitos.desc: According to Art. 18 of the LGPD, you have the right to:
lgpd.direitos.item1: Confirmation of the existence of data processing
lgpd.direitos.item3: Correction of incomplete, inaccurate or outdated data
lgpd.direitos.item4: Anonymization, blocking or deletion of unnecessary data
lgpd.direitos.item6: Deletion of data processed with consent
lgpd.seguranca.title: Security
lgpd.seguranca.desc: We adopt appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect personal data against unauthorized access, destruction, loss, alteration or improper disclosure.
lgpd.retencao.title: Data Retention
lgpd.retencao.desc: Data is kept for as long as necessary to fulfill the described purposes, respecting applicable legal retention and statute of limitations periods.
lgpd.contato.title: Contact
lgpd.contato.desc: To exercise your rights or clarify questions about the processing of personal data, contact us via email:
termoUsuario.title: User Responsibility Terms
termoUsuario.declaracaoDesc: By using this platform, you declare that you are aware that:
termoUsuario.declaracaoItem2: You understand the legal responsibilities involved
termoUsuario.declaracaoItem3: You agree with all terms established herein
termoUsuario.declaracaoItem4: You will use the platform ethically and responsibly
termoUsuario.section1.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
termoUsuario.section1.desc: By using the Ciclista Denuncie platform, you agree to the terms and conditions established herein. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, do not use the platform.
termoUsuario.section2.title: 2. Truthfulness of Information
termoUsuario.section2.aviso: WARNING: Providing false information constitutes a crime under Art. 299 of the Brazilian Penal Code (ideological falsehood), punishable by 1 to 5 years imprisonment and a fine.
termoUsuario.section2.desc: The user declares and guarantees that:
termoUsuario.section2.item1: All information provided is true and accurate
termoUsuario.section2.item2: The reported facts occurred as described
termoUsuario.section2.item3: The indicated locations correspond to the actual incident sites
termoUsuario.section2.item4: You will not use the platform for defamation, slander or libel
termoUsuario.section2.item5: You will not register false or misleading reports
termoUsuario.section3.title: 3. Proper Use of the Platform
termoUsuario.section3.desc: The platform is intended exclusively for recording real incidents related to urban bicycle mobility. The user agrees to:
termoUsuario.section3.item1: Use the platform only for legitimate purposes
termoUsuario.section3.item2: Not publish offensive, discriminatory or illegal content
termoUsuario.section3.item3: Not use the platform for harassment or stalking
termoUsuario.section3.item4: Respect the privacy of third parties
termoUsuario.section3.item5: Not disclose sensitive personal data of others without consent
termoUsuario.section4.title: 4. Civil and Criminal Liability
termoUsuario.section4.desc: The user is fully responsible for:
termoUsuario.section4.item1: All content published on the platform
termoUsuario.section4.item2: Damages caused to third parties by false or defamatory information
termoUsuario.section4.item3: Legal consequences arising from improper use of the platform
termoUsuario.section4.indenizacao: The user agrees to indemnify and hold harmless the Ciclista Denuncie platform from any claim, loss or damage resulting from improper use of the service.
termoUsuario.section5.title: 5. Related Crimes
termoUsuario.section5.desc: Be aware of the following criminal classifications:
termoUsuario.section5.item1: Ideological Falsehood (Art. 299 CP): Omitting or inserting false statement in a document - 1 to 5 years imprisonment and fine
termoUsuario.section5.item2: Slander (Art. 138 CP): Falsely imputing a crime to someone - 6 months to 2 years detention and fine
termoUsuario.section5.item3: Defamation (Art. 139 CP): Imputing offensive facts to reputation - 3 months to 1 year detention and fine
termoUsuario.section5.item4: Libel (Art. 140 CP): Offending dignity or decorum - 1 to 6 months detention or fine
termoUsuario.section5.item5: Malicious Accusation (Art. 339 CP): Causing investigation against an innocent person - 2 to 8 years imprisonment and fine
termoPlataforma.title: Platform Responsibility Terms
termoPlataforma.avisoDesc: Ciclista Denuncie is a collaborative mapping platform. All published content is the sole responsibility of the users who submit it. The platform does not verify, validate or endorse the information provided.
termoPlataforma.section1.title: 1. Nature of the Platform
termoPlataforma.section1.desc: Ciclista Denuncie is a tool for:
termoPlataforma.section1.item1: Collaborative mapping of incidents related to urban bicycle mobility
termoPlataforma.section1.item2: Visualization of data provided by users
termoPlataforma.section1.item3: Raising awareness about issues faced by cyclists
termoPlataforma.section1.item4: Informational support for discussions on public policy
termoPlataforma.section1.naoItem4: An official source of statistical data
termoPlataforma.section2.title: 2. Responsibility for Content
termoPlataforma.section2.desc1: All content published on the platform is the sole responsibility of the user who submits it.
termoPlataforma.section2.item1: Does NOT verify the truthfulness of information provided
termoPlataforma.section2.item2: Does NOT validate the authenticity of reports
termoPlataforma.section2.item3: Does NOT confirm the occurrence of reported incidents
termoPlataforma.section2.item5: Does NOT assume responsibility for false, inaccurate or misleading information
termoPlataforma.section2.item6: Is NOT liable for damages caused by content published by users
termoPlataforma.section3.title: 3. Limitation of Liability
termoPlataforma.section3.desc: The platform and its administrators are NOT liable for:
termoPlataforma.section3.item1: Accuracy, completeness or reliability of published information
termoPlataforma.section3.item2: Direct or indirect damages resulting from use of the platform
termoPlataforma.section3.item3: Decisions made based on the information provided
termoPlataforma.section3.item4: Conflicts, disputes or legal proceedings between users and third parties
termoPlataforma.section3.item5: Violations of third party rights by users
termoPlataforma.section3.item6: Crimes committed through misuse of the platform
termoPlataforma.section3.item8: Offensive, defamatory or illegal content published by users
termoPlataforma.section4.title: 4. Use of Information
termoPlataforma.section4.desc: The information made available on the platform:
termoPlataforma.section4.item1: Is provided "as is", without any warranties
termoPlataforma.section4.item2: Should not be considered as legal proof or official evidence
termoPlataforma.section4.item3: Does not replace police reports or formal reports to authorities
termoPlataforma.section4.item4: May contain errors, inaccuracies or outdated information
termoPlataforma.section4.item5: Should be interpreted with critical thinking and caution
termoPlataforma.section5.title: 5. Official Reports
termoPlataforma.section5.aviso: IMPORTANT: This platform does NOT replace official reports to competent authorities.
termoPlataforma.section5.desc: In case of crimes or situations requiring official intervention, contact:
termoPlataforma.section5.item3: Civil Police: Stations for filing police reports
termoPlataforma.section5.item4: Public Prosecutor's Office: For reporting irregularities
termoPlataforma.section5.item5: Municipal Ombudsman: For urban infrastructure issues
termoPlataforma.section6.title: 6. Service Availability
termoPlataforma.section6.desc: The platform is provided without guarantees of:
termoPlataforma.section6.item2: Absence of errors or technical failures
termoPlataforma.section6.item3: Absolute security against intrusions or attacks
termoPlataforma.section6.fim: The service may be discontinued, modified or interrupted at any time, without prior notice.
termoPlataforma.section7.title: 7. Data Security and Privacy
termoPlataforma.section7.autenticacao: Authentication System: We use Firebase Authentication, a secure authentication system provided by Google, which ensures:
termoPlataforma.section7.privacidade: User Privacy: Your login data is protected and:
termoPlataforma.section7.privItem1: Your username does NOT appear publicly on reports
termoPlataforma.section7.privItem2: Only you can see your own contributions on the "My Contributions" page
termoPlataforma.section7.privItem3: The user-report linkage is used ONLY to give you the power to edit or delete your own points
termoPlataforma.section7.privItem4: Administrators can see the author of reports only for moderation purposes
termoPlataforma.section7.autonomia: User Autonomy: When logged in, you have full control over your reports:
termoPlataforma.section7.autItem1: Edit your reports at any time
termoPlataforma.section7.autItem4: Access all your contributions in one place
termoPlataforma.section7.historico: Edit History: When you edit a report:
termoPlataforma.section7.histItem2: Each edit is recorded with date and time
termoPlataforma.section7.histItem3: An "~edited" tag subtly appears on the report
termoPlataforma.section7.histItem4: The most recent report is always displayed publicly
termoPlataforma.section8.title: 8. Cooperation with Authorities
termoPlataforma.section8.desc: The platform will fully cooperate with competent authorities in investigations, providing data upon court order, as provided for in the Brazilian Internet Civil Rights Framework.
termoPlataforma.resumo.title: 📋 SUMMARY
termoPlataforma.resumo.desc: In summary, Ciclista Denuncie is a collaborative mapping tool where:
termoPlataforma.resumo.item1: Users are responsible for the content they publish
termoPlataforma.resumo.item2: The platform does not verify or validate information
termoPlataforma.resumo.item3: We do not replace official reports to authorities
termoPlataforma.resumo.item4: We are not liable for damages arising from use
termoPlataforma.resumo.item5: The service is provided "as is", without guarantees
termoPlataforma.resumo.fim: Use with responsibility and common sense. In emergencies, contact the competent authorities.
